transcript: Well, I'm real busy here, so... um, I guess, if you don't really have a... legitimate question, I have to go.
I asked you about the Zingers.
Yeah, Zingers. I have no clue what a Zinger is, so... um, no-one told me anything about a Zinger, so... I can't help ya on that.
I need to talk to Herschel Klinger.
Yeah, no, they're not a shopper. Not here today, they're not. I gotta go. Well, thanks for calling, have a nice day...
'[reversed]' I don't know who you're looking for.
